title: Overgrown's Cobblemon: Darkrai
description: Darkrai missing from your Cobblemon world? This pack fixes that!
body:
**Overgrown's Cobblemon: Darkrai is an open-source Cobblemon datapack/mod for Fabric, Forge, and NeoForge.** --- The goal of the pack is simple. To add a beloved Pokémon for everyone to enjoy! The source code is open and I encourage not only community contributions, but also forking. ![Cobblemon Divider](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/dc09f2fafd636f34e7462b823984513cddab2ce1.png)
Installation
**_Fabric:_** - Requires the recommended Fabric Loader version for your version of Minecraft. - Requires Fabric API. - Put Fabric API and Cobblemon-Fabric in the mods folder. **_NeoForge:_** - Requires the recommended NeoForge version for your version of Minecraft. - Requires Kotlin for Forge. - Put Kotlin for Forge and Cobblemon-NeoForge in the mods folder.
